# AgroDeals (Lakshmi Ganapathi Traders)

An online agricultural store for Indian farmers to purchase genuine, registered farm inputs at competitive prices. Sourced directly from certified manufacturers with valid license numbers.

## Core Offerings
- **Pesticides Store**: Insecticides, Fungicides, and Herbicides to protect crops from pests and diseases.
- **Fertilizers Store**: Balanced NPK mixtures, essential micronutrients, and premium organic crop foods.
- **Seeds Store**: High-yielding, certified hybrid seeds for cotton, paddy, chilli, and tomato crops.
- **Farmer Loyalty Program**: Repeat purchasers receive a 10% loyalty discount by detailing their cultivation profile (acres, crop type, past product usage).
- **Support & Consultations**: Practical farm advisory and support ticket desk for agricultural questions.

## Platform Metadata
- Homepage URL: https://lgt-iota.vercel.app/
- Store Location: Karempudi, Palnadu District, Andhra Pradesh, India
- GST Registration: 37ANKPD0775A1ZC
